title.ko: 일반적인 열 교환 또는 열전달장치의 세부(열전달, 열교환 또는 열저장물질 C09K 5/00; 물 또는 공기 트랩(trap), 공기빼기(air venting) F16)
title.en: DETAILS OF HEAT-EXCHANGE OR HEAT-TRANSFER APPARATUS, OF GENERAL APPLICATION (heat-transfer, heat-exchange or heat-storage materials C09K0005000000;water or air traps, air venting F16)

definition.ko: 세부 및 그 배치; 열교환 또는 전달의 요소 및 그 조립 관상; 판상; 운동용; 기타 F28F1/00; 3/00; 5/00; 7/00; 요소의 보조 지지; 밀봉 F28F9/00; 11/00; 외상(CASINGS) 및 헤더박스(HEADER BOXES) F28F9/00; 침적 또는 부식의 예방 F28F17/00, F28F19/00 열교환장치의 특성 선택에 특징이 있는 것; 구성재료; 중간 열교환물질 F28F21/00; 23/00 산수(散水)식 냉각기의 구성요소 F28F25/00 열전달의 수정; 장치의 제어 F28F13/00; 27/00 이 서브클래스의 다른 그룹으로 분류되지 않는 주제사항 F28F99/00

title.ko: 관상요소; 관상요소의 조립(운동용에 특히 적합한 것 F28F 5/00)
title.en: Tubular elements; Assemblies of tubular elements (specially adapted for movement F28F0005000000)

title.ko: 비원형 횡단면의 관상요소(F28F 1/08, F28F 1/10이 우선)
title.en: Tubular elements of cross-section which is non-circular (F28F0001080000, F28F0001100000 take precedence)
polygonal, e.g. rectangular
crimped or corrugated in cross-section
Tubular elements crimped or corrugated in longitudinal section

title.ko: 열전달면적을 증가하기 위한 관상요소 또는 그 조립, 예. 핀(fins) 가진 것, 돌출부를 가진 것, 요부를 가진 것(주름 잡혀진 또는 파형으로 한 관상요소 F28F 1/06, F28F 1/08)
title.en: Tubular elements or assemblies thereof with means for increasing heat-transfer area, e.g. with fins, with projections, with recesses (crimped or corrugated elements F28F0001060000, F28F0001080000)

title.ko: 관상요소의 외면에만 있는 수단
title.en: the means being only outside the tubular element

title.ko: 종적으로 길어지는 것(F28F 1/38 이 우선)
title.en: and extending longitudinally (F28F0001380000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 요소와 일체로 형성되는 수단, 예. 추출에 의해서 형성한 것(F28F 1/22가 우선)
title.en: the means being integral with the element, e.g. formed by extrusion (F28F0001220000 takes precedence)
the element being built-up from finned sections

title.ko: 요소에 부가되는 수단(F28F 1/22가 우선)
title.en: the means being attachable to the element (F28F0001220000 takes precedence)
the means having portions engaging further tubular elements

title.ko: 횡적으로 길어지는 것(F28F 1/38이 우선)
title.en: and extending transversely (F28F0001380000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 요소와 일체로 형성되는 수단(F28F 1/32가 우선)
title.en: the means being integral with the element (F28F0001320000 takes precedence)
the element being built-up from finned sections

title.ko: 요소에 부가되는 수단(F28F 1/32가 우선)
title.en: the means being attachable to the element (F28F0001320000 takes precedence)
the means having portions engaging further tubular elements

title.ko: 경사로 길어지는 것(F28F 1/38이 우선)
title.en: and extending obliquely (F28F0001380000 takes precedence)
the means being helically-wound fins or wire spirals
and being staggered to form tortuous fluid passages
the means being only inside the tubular element
the means being both outside and inside the tubular element
and being formed of wire mesh

title.ko: 판상 또는 적층판상요소; 판상 또는 적층판상요소의 조립(운동용에 특히 적합한 요소 F28F 5/00)
title.en: Plate-like or laminated elements; Assemblies of plate-like or laminated elements (specially adapted for movement F28F0005000000)

title.ko: 열전달면의 증가를 위한 요소 또는 그 조립, 예. 핀(fins)를 가진 것, 요부를 가진 것, 파상부를 가진 것(F28F 3/08이 우선)
title.en: Elements or assemblies thereof with means for increasing heat-transfer area, e.g. with fins, with recesses, with corrugations (F28F0003080000 takes precedence)
the means being integral with the element
the means being attachable to the element
Elements constructed for building-up into stacks, e.g. capable of being taken apart for cleaning
Arrangement for sealing the margins

title.ko: 공 페널(hollow panel)상으로 조립된 요소, 예 채널(Channels)이 있는 것
title.en: Elements constructed in the shape of a hollow panel, e.g. with channels

title.ko: 채널을 형성하기 위하여 1대의 접합판의 일부를 팽창등에 의해서 분리된 것(그 제조 B23P)
title.en: by separating portions of a pair of joined sheets to form channels, e.g. by inflation (manufacture thereof B23P)
Elements specially adapted for movement
Rotary drums or rollers
Hollow impellers, e.g. stirring vane
Hollow screw conveyors

title.ko: 그룹 F28F 1/00, F28F 3/00 또는 F28F 5/00에 포함되지 않는 요소
title.en: Elements not covered by group F28F0001000000, F28F0003000000, or F28F0005000000
Blocks traversed by passages for heat-exchange media

title.ko: 케이싱; 헤더박스(header boxes) 요소의 보조지지 케이싱의 보조부재
title.en: Casings; Header boxes; Auxiliary supports for elements; Auxiliary members within casings
Auxiliary supports for elements
for tubes or tube-assemblies

title.ko: 헤더박스(header boxes) 경판(end plates)
title.en: Header boxes; End plates

title.ko: 헤더박스(header boxes) 또는 경판 내에의 밀봉요소를 위한 장치(벽체에 대한 관의 연결 일반 F16L 41/00)
title.en: Arrangements for sealing elements into header boxes or end plates (joining pipes to walls in general F16L0041000000)
by dismountable joints
by wedge-type connections, e.g. taper ferrule
by screw-type connections, e.g. gland
by flange-type connections
by force-joining

title.ko: 영구적 조인트에 의한 것, 예 압연에 의한 것(금속가공 공정 일반 B21, B23, 특히 B21D 39/06, B23K)
title.en: by permanent joints, e.g. by rolling (metal-working procedures in general B21, B23, particularly B21D0039060000, B23K)
by welding
Arrangements of heat reflectors, e.g. separately-insertible reflecting walls
Arrangements for directing heat-exchange media into successive compartments, e.g. arrangements of guide plates

title.ko: 열교환매체의 난류촉진을 위한 장치, 예. 판에 의한 것(F28F 1/38이 우선; 일반적인 것 F15D)
title.en: Arrangements for promoting turbulent flow of heat-exchange media, e.g. by plates (F28F0001380000 takes precedence;in general F15D)

title.ko: 열교환요소, 예. 방열기의 상이한 부분을 연결하기 위한 장치(물가열기 내에 있어서의 상이한 부분의 연결 F24H 9/14)
title.en: Arrangements for connecting different sections of heat-exchange elements, e.g. of radiators (connecting different sections in water heaters F24H0009140000)

title.ko: 누설되기 쉬운 관 또는 도관을 밀봉하기 위한 장치(파이프내 또는 파이프로 부터의 흐름의 정지일반 F16L 55/10)
title.en: Arrangements for sealing leaky tubes or conduits (stopping flow from or in pipes in general F16L0055100000)

title.ko: 상호 독립해서 삽입 및 조작되는 폐쇄요소, 예. 와셔(washer)를 이용하는 것(F28F 11/06이 우선)
title.en: using obturating elements, e.g. washers, inserted and operated independently of each other (F28F0011060000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 한 쌍의 폐쇄요소, 예. 중앙조작봉에 부착되는 와셔(F28F11/06 이 우선)
title.en: using pairs of obturating elements, e.g. washers, mounted upon central operating rods (F28F0011060000 takes precedence)
using automatic tube-obturating appliances

title.ko: 열전달 수정을 위한 장치, 예. 증가, 감소(F28F 1/00 ～ F28F 11/00이 우선)
title.en: Arrangements for modifying heat transfer, e.g. increasing, decreasing (F28F0001000000-F28F0011000000 take precedence)

title.ko: 유체의 경계에 영향을 미치는 것에 의한 것(경계층 제어일반 F15D)
title.en: by influencing fluid boundary (boundary-layer control in general F15D)
by preventing the formation of continuous films of condensate on heat-exchange surfaces, e.g. by promoting droplet formation

title.ko: 열 교환매체의 흐름의 양식에 영향을 주는 것에 의한 것
title.en: by affecting the pattern of flow of the heat-exchange media
by varying the cross-section of the flow channels
by imparting a pulsating motion to the flow, e.g. by sonic vibration

title.ko: 난류를 일으키는 것에 의한 것, 예 스터링(stirring)에 의한 것, 순환력의 증가에 의한 것(F28F 13/08이 우선)
title.en: by creating turbulence, e.g. by stirring, by increasing the force of circulation (F28F0013080000 takes precedence)
by endowing the walls of conduits with zones of different degrees of conduction of heat
by applying an electrostatic field to the body of the heat-exchange medium
by applying coatings, e.g. radiation-absorbing, radiation-reflecting; by surface treatment, e.g. polishing
Removing ice or water from heat-exchange apparatus
Preventing the formation of deposits or corrosion, e.g. by using filters
by using means for separating solid materials from heat-exchange fluids, e.g. filters
by using coatings, e.g. vitreous or enamel coatings
of rubber; of plastics material; of varnish
of metal
Constructions of heat-exchange apparatus characterised by the selection of particular materials
of carbon, e.g. graphite
of ceramic; of concrete; of natural stone
of plastics material
of metal
Features relating to the use of intermediate heat-exchange materials, e.g. selection of compositions
Arrangements for obtaining or maintaining same in a liquid state

title.ko: 살수식 냉각기의 구성요소(열전달을 증가하기 위한 배치 F28F 13/00; 제어장치 F28F 27/00)
title.en: Component parts of trickle coolers (arrangements for increasing heat transfer F28F0013000000;controlling arrangements F28F0027000000)

title.ko: 분배, 순환 또는 유체받이를 위한 것(분사 또는 분무일반 B05B, B05D)
title.en: for distributing, circulating, or accumulating liquid (spraying or atomising in general B05B, B05D)
Distributing or accumulator troughs
Spray nozzles or spray pipes

title.ko: 튀김판(splashing board) 또는 격자(grids), 예. 액체분사를 액체 막으로 바꾸기 위한 것 접촉면적을 증가시키기 위한 여과요소 또는 여상(충전요소 일반 B01J 19/30, B01J 19/32)
title.en: Splashing boards or grids, e.g. for converting liquid sprays into liquid films; Elements or beds for increasing the area of the contact surface (packing elements in general B01J0019300000, B01J0019320000)
for feeding gas or vapour
Ducts; Guide vanes, e.g. for carrying currents to distinct zones

title.ko: 열 교환 또는 열전달장치를 위하여 특히 적합한 제어장치
title.en: Control arrangements or safety devices specially adapted for heat-exchange or heat-transfer apparatus

title.ko: 상이한 유로간에 열 교환매체의 분배를 제어하기 위한 것(안내판 또는 안내날개(guide vanes) 9/22, 25/12)
title.en: for controlling the distribution of heat-exchange media between different channels (arrangements of guide plates or guide vanes F28F0009220000, F28F0025120000)
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
